# PrecodeOS AI Navigation Index

AUTHORITY: Curated AI-readable navigation index for stable PrecodeOS package documentation.
NOT_AUTHORITY: Active memory, task selection, PRD approval, bead activation, generated evidence, implementation status, package update behavior, runtime integration, or a replacement for canonical Markdown owner files.
LOAD_WHEN: An AI assistant or documentation tool needs a compact starting index for stable PrecodeOS docs and protocols before choosing the smallest relevant source.
CLASS: reference-navigation

Creator: Dan Sears / Recode
License: Apache-2.0
Copyright: (c) 2026 Dan Sears / Recode
Document version: v0.1.5
Last updated: 2026-06-23

This file is a navigation aid only. It points to canonical Markdown files and must not be used to approve work, choose tasks, run commands, replace active memory, summarize away source evidence, or infer current project state.

## Start Here

- `README.md`: public package compass, usage fit, setup path, and high-level navigation.
- `docs/PRECODE-OS-README.md`: beginner-facing Builder OS explainer.
- `docs/PRECODE-DAILY-COCKPIT.md`: day-to-day user cockpit and safe next prompts.
- `docs/PRECODE-USER-GUIDE.md`: practical operating guide for normal PrecodeOS use.
- `docs/PRECODE-PACKAGE-FILE-INVENTORY.md`: public package file map, context-layer matrix, authority boundaries, and ownership dictionary.
- `CANDIDATE-QUEUE.md`: parked candidate intent, product-value ratings, themes, near-bead sketches, and promotion review surface; not task authority.

## Active Memory Contract

Normal Precode sessions start from exactly:

- `AGENT.md`
- `DECISIONS.md`
- `tasks/todo.md`

Do not expand active memory through this index, generated reports, reviewed memory, adapters, skill playbooks, or maintainer-local files.

## Protocol Entry Points

- `tasks/reference/WORKFLOW-SELECTION-PROTOCOL.md`: choose the right Precode workflow before acting, including Plan Loop routing for explicit post-intake or post-PRD feature-angle exploration before bead commitment.
- `tasks/reference/CANDIDATE-QUEUE-PROTOCOL.md`: park ideas, review candidate intent, assign product-value ratings, group themes, sketch near-beads, route candidates to intake/discovery/PRD/decomposition, and preserve non-authority boundaries.
- `tasks/reference/EXTENSION-PROTOCOL.md`: review adapters, protocols, skill playbooks, generated reports, wrappers, indexes, and integrations.
- `tasks/reference/SKILL-PLAYBOOK-PROTOCOL.md`: read-only prompt playbooks for host agents.
- `tasks/reference/MEMORY-PROTOCOL.md`: reviewed memory search, citation, freshness, and promotion rules.
- `tasks/reference/TOOL-EXECUTION-PROTOCOL.md`: tool-call classes, command approval, failure categories, and proof-vs-tool-use boundaries.
- `tasks/reference/VERIFICATION-GUARDRAIL-PROTOCOL.md`: proof expectations and generated-evidence limits.
- `ACCEPTANCE.md` and `tasks/reference/PRD-PROTOCOL.md`: acceptance criteria and PRD acceptance-oracle guidance, including optional EARS-style wording for vague expected behavior.
- `tasks/reference/SESSION-COMPLETION-HANDOFF-PROTOCOL.md`: closeout, handoff, and review evidence shape.
- `tasks/reference/RECOVERY-PROTOCOL.md`: stuck-user recovery and safe triage.

## Stable Help Surfaces

- `docs/PRECODE-GUIDED-SETUP.md`: beginner-safe package adoption guidance.
- `docs/PRECODE-TROUBLESHOOTING.md`: symptom-first recovery and validation routing.
- `docs/PRECODE-SUPPORT-RUNBOOK.md`: support-assisted setup and recovery guidance.
- `docs/CLAUDE-CODE-FIELD-GUIDE.md`: public field guide for Claude Code users.
- `tasks/reference/PROMPT-PATTERNS.md`: copyable prompts for common Precode workflows.

## Generated Reading Surfaces

- `docs-html/*.html`: generated public reading surface for `docs/*.md` and selected root public docs, including `CANDIDATE-QUEUE.md`, with static progress cues, section links, and source Markdown links; Markdown remains canonical.
- `scripts/docs-html.py --check`: public freshness check for `docs-html/*.html`.
- `scripts/candidate-queue.py`: local Candidate Queue preview/apply helper; preview is non-authority and apply requires explicit `--approve-action`.
- `scripts/session-friction-check.py`: read-only Session Friction Review diagnostic; findings are generated evidence only and require manual promotion.
- `scripts/build-attribution-ledger.py`: read-only Build Attribution Ledger diagnostic; who-built-what findings are generated evidence only and require closeout review.
- `tasks/prds-html/*.html`: generated PRD review surface; Markdown PRDs remain canonical.
- `OS-HEALTH.md`, `PROGRESS.md`, and `logs/*`: generated evidence only, not authority.

## Maintainer Context

Private maintainer material under `_maintainer/` is not normal user-session input and is not public package authority. Use it only for Dan's package-maintenance work when explicitly requested.

## Guardrails

- Do not install, wrap, proxy, compress, update, or mutate any runtime from this index.
- Do not use this file as a package registry, optional-pack manifest, or tool integration contract.
- Do not summarize raw source evidence in a way that replaces owner files, PRDs, beads, recorded checks, logs, or manual verification.
- When a question depends on current state, inspect active memory, the active bead, source Markdown, generated evidence, or the relevant owner file directly.
